name: Coral Sea Marina - Premium Tour
description: Embark on a premium adventure from the Coral Sea Marina, offering an exclusive experience perfect for those seeking both relaxation and adventure. This tour combines the beauty of the Whitsundays with the thrill of exploring the Great Barrier Reef. Ideal for couples and small groups, it promises an unforgettable journey through some of the most stunning marine landscapes.
departure_location: Coral Sea Marina Meeting Point C
includes:
Shared accommodation
Private double cabin option
Access to premium facilities
highlights:
Explore the Great Barrier Reef
Visit the stunning Whitsunday Islands
Snorkeling and scuba diving opportunities
Relax on Whitehaven Beach
Customizable itineraries for private charters
price_tiers: Shared Accommodation (16+): A$798 | Private Double Cabin (requires 2 people): A$2051 Total
locations: Airlie Beach,Great Barrier Reef,Hamilton Island,Hill Inlet,Whitehaven,Whitsunday Island
ideal_for: Couples, small groups, and adventure seekers
important_information: ['Minimum Age is 6 years old.', 'Children ages 6-15 years must be booked into a private cabin.', 'Anyone ages 16+ can be booked into an open single.', 'Children travel on this tour at full adult rates.', 'Guests 15 and under must be booked into Private Accommodations.', 'For safety reasons all passengers must be able to swim and speak fluent English.']
